SAKURAMOD-GENERIC.manifestPrompt: Choose a Clear Card to manifest.
SAKURAMOD-GALE.title: Gale
SAKURAMOD-GALE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Deal {ReleaseDamage:diff()} damage again. Draw {ReleaseDraw:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-REFLECT.title: Reflect
SAKURAMOD-REFLECT.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {UpgradeBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
|}The next time an enemy attack hits you, [gold]Reflect[/gold] half of that attack's damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Reflect[/gold] all of it instead.
SAKURAMOD-FLIGHT.title: Flight
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND.title: Dream Wand
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} Clear Card in your hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn and costs 1 less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-ACTION.title: Action
SAKURAMOD-ACTION.description:
Choose 1 card in your hand and Exhaust it. [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Manifested cards cost 0 this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Draw {ReleaseDraw:diff()} card(s).
SAKURAMOD-APPEAR.title: Appear
SAKURAMOD-APPEAR.description:
[gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Cards Manifested this way cost {ReleaseDiscount:diff()} less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-AQUA.title: Aqua
SAKURAMOD-AQUA.description:
Deal {AquaDamage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release:[/gold] For each enemy, deal {AquaDamageExtra:diff()} additional damage per 10 [gold]Frostbite[/gold], then double its [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BLADE.title: Blade
SAKURAMOD-BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. If a card gained [gold]Release[/gold] this turn, deal damage 1 additional time.
[gold]Release:[/gold] For each card that gained [gold]Release[/gold] this turn, deal damage 1 additional time.
SAKURAMOD-HAIL.title: Hail
SAKURAMOD-HAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 3 times. Each hit applies {SakuraFrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Hit one additional time.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID.title: Lucid
SAKURAMOD-LUCID.description:
Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Put 1 into your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SHADE.title: Shade
SAKURAMOD-SHADE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Retain your [gold]Block[/gold] until next turn.
SAKURAMOD-SIEGE.title: Siege
SAKURAMOD-SIEGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Gain {ReleaseBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-SWING.title: Swing
SAKURAMOD-SWING.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. For each [gold]Weak[/gold] on an enemy, damage is increased by {WeakDamage:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Double the [gold]Weak[/gold] damage bonus.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COMPASS.title: Dream Compass
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COMPASS.description: Choose a Clear Card from your draw pile and put it into your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.description: Draw 1 card. Choose 1 card in your hand and [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it.{IfUpgraded:show: It costs 0 this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-ROLLERBLADE_DASH.title: Rollerblade Dash
SAKURAMOD-ROLLERBLADE_DASH.description: If you have not [gold]Manifested[/gold] this turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Otherwise, the next card you use this turn is used 1 additional time.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_BARRIER.title: Magic Barrier
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_BARRIER.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {TemporaryBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each [red]Temporary[/red] card in your hand.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_ADVICE.title: Kero Advice
SAKURAMOD-KERO_ADVICE.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). The first Skill drawn this way costs 0 this turn; if none, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_COSTUME.title: Tomoyo Costume
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_COSTUME.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card in your hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold], and its [red]Temporary[/red] removal is delayed by {Delay:diff()} turn.
SAKURAMOD-BREAK.title: Break
SAKURAMOD-BREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has [gold]Block[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:remove its [gold]Block[/gold], then |}deal double.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Remove 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold] and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE.title: Choice
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE.description:
Choose: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {ManifestCards:diff()}; or draw {DrawCards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Release:[/gold] Do the chosen option twice.
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE_MANIFEST_CHOICE.title: Manifest
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE_DRAW_CHOICE.title: Draw
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE.title: Promise
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Next turn, if you did not lose HP, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Manifest[/gold] {ReleaseCards:diff()} additional card.
SAKURAMOD-STRUGGLE.title: Struggle
SAKURAMOD-STRUGGLE.description:
Discard your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Deal it X plus the number of discarded cards times instead.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME.title: Dream Costume
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME.description: The first [red]Temporary[/red] card you play each turn costs 1 less.
SAKURAMOD-BLAZE.title: Blaze
SAKURAMOD-BLAZE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Apply {SakuraBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold]. For each [red]Temporary[/red] card removed previously this combat, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Double this damage increase.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING.title: Dreaming
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING.description:
At the start of your turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1 now.
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION.title: Gravitation
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION.description:
ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] The next {ReleaseReturns:diff()} cards that would enter your discard pile this turn return to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE.title: Mirage
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE.description:
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold]. Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:Mirage Image+|Mirage Image} to your discard pile.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Add it to your hand instead.
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE.title: Mirage Image
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE.description: The next time you would take attack damage, reduce it by {MirageImagePower:diff()}.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD.title: Record
SAKURAMOD-RECORD.description:
If nothing is recorded, record your HP and Block. Otherwise, set your HP and Block to the recorded values, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] When recording, draw {Cards:diff()} card. When replaying, gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
Upgrade: Gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.title: Kero Recon
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.selectionPrompt: Choose up to {MaxCount} card(s) to Exhaust.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.description: Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Exhaust any number of them.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BREAK.title: Kero Snack Break
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BREAK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 1 card. |}Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. If you previously used a [gold]Released[/gold] card this turn, draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND.title: Kero Bond
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND.description: Increase your maximum hand size by {KeroBondPower:diff()}. Each turn, after the first Clear Card you use, draw {KeroBondPower:diff()} cards.
At the start of your turn, a {IfUpgraded:show:chosen|random} Clear Card in your hand gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. The first time each turn you use a [gold]Released[/gold] card, trigger this again.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING.title: Magic Awakening
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {MagicAwakeningPower:diff()}.
SAKURAMOD-EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
SAKURAMOD-EXCHANGE.description:
Draw 1 card. Choose 2 cards in hand. Exchange their [red]Temporary[/red] states and {IfUpgraded:show:combat-long|this-turn} costs.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Also exchange [gold]Release[/gold] states.
SAKURAMOD-KINDNESS.title: Kindness
SAKURAMOD-KINDNESS.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. Discover 1 {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}Partner card and add it to your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-LABYRINTH.title: Labyrinth
SAKURAMOD-LABYRINTH.description:
Stun 1 enemy.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Stun ALL enemies instead.
SAKURAMOD-REPAIR.title: Repair
SAKURAMOD-REPAIR.description:
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Your [gold]Regeneration[/gold] no longer decreases at end of turn this combat.
SAKURAMOD-REVERSAL.title: Reversal
SAKURAMOD-REVERSAL.description:
Exchange your draw pile and discard pile. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For every {PileCardsPerDamage:diff()} cards exchanged, deal {PileDamage:diff()} additional damage. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Draw until your hand is full.
SAKURAMOD-REWIND.title: Rewind
SAKURAMOD-REWIND.description:
Choose a card from your exhaust pile and return it to your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-SNOOZE.title: Snooze
SAKURAMOD-SPIRAL.title: Spiral
SAKURAMOD-SPIRAL.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. For each Spiral played previously this combat, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Add 1 [red]Temporary[/red] Spiral to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-TRANSFER.title: Transfer
SAKURAMOD-TRANSFER.description:
An enemy loses {EnemyStrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Gain {StrengthGain:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityGain:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] No longer [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_DREAM.title: Akiho's Dream
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_DREAM.description: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. At the start of your next turn, draw 1 card.{IfUpgraded:show: Manifested cards cost 1 less this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE.title: Alice in Clockland
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE.descriptio: Record damage dealt and Block gained by [red]Temporary[/red] cards. After first recording damage or Block, at the start of your next turn, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:Reading+|Reading} to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-ALICE_READING.title: Reading
SAKURAMOD-ALICE_READING.description: Release previously recorded damage and Block. Deal {StoredDamage:diff()} damage. Gain {StoredBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.selectionPromp: Choose up to {MaxCount} Clear Cards to gain Temporary.
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.description: Choose up to {MaxCards:diff()} non-[red]Temporary[/red] Clear Cards in your hand. They gain [red]Temporary[/red]. For each card that gains [red]Temporary[/red], gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-D_WATCH.title: D's Pocket Watch
SAKURAMOD-D_WATCH.description: Choose a non-[red]Temporary[/red] card from your discard pile and return it to your hand. It costs 0 this turn and gains [red]Temporary[/red].
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE.title: False Daily Life
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE.description: Whenever a card gains [red]Temporary[/red], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Whenever a [red]Temporary[/red] card is removed from combat, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-STARLIGHT_CHANT.title: Starlight Chant
SAKURAMOD-STARLIGHT_CHANT.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. For each card in your [gold]Catalog[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-ARCHIVE.title: Archive
SAKURAMOD-ARCHIVE.description: Add 1 random [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card that is not in your [gold]Catalog[/gold] to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-GROWING_MAGIC.title: Growing Magic
SAKURAMOD-GROWING_MAGIC.description: Whenever you [gold]Stabilize[/gold] a card, gain {GrowingMagicPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-RELEASE_CHANT.title: Release Chant
SAKURAMOD-RELEASE_CHANT.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-CARD_BOOK_SORTING.title: Fire God Invocation
SAKURAMOD-CARD_BOOK_SORTING.description: Apply {SakuraBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold]. Gain {FireElements:diff()} [gold]Fire[/gold] element. Trigger all [gold]Fire[/gold] element Talisman effects.
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_MAGIC.title: Nameless Magic
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_MAGIC.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. For each card in your [gold]Catalog[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-CHAIN_PHENOMENON.title: Chain Phenomenon
SAKURAMOD-CHAIN_PHENOMENON.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. For each different Clear Card played previously this turn, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE.title: Magic Surge
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE.description: Each turn, the first time you [gold]Manifest[/gold], [gold]Manifest[/gold] {MagicSurgePower:diff()} additional card.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_TUNING.title: Magic Tuning
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_TUNING.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. If it is [red]Temporary[/red], [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it. Otherwise, it gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND_COMBO.title: Kero Fire Breath
SAKURAMOD-COMPASS_TRACKING.title: Compass Tracking
SAKURAMOD-COMPASS_TRACKING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each different Element played this turn, deal {ElementDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-THUNDER_EMPEROR_SUMMON.title: Thunder Emperor Summon
SAKURAMOD-THUNDER_EMPEROR_SUMMON.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. This card counts as [gold]Wind[/gold] and [gold]Fire[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-MEILING_COMBO_KICK.title: Meiling Combo Kick
SAKURAMOD-MEILING_COMBO_KICK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] [gold]Released[/gold] Struggle to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO.title: Talisman Combo
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO.description: The next Element you play this turn does not trigger. After that, if an Element differs from the previous Element, trigger the previous Element's talisman effect. If it is the same, draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-SILVER_MOON_WING.title: Silver Moon Wing
SAKURAMOD-SILVER_MOON_WING.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you previously played a [gold]Released[/gold] card this turn, gain {ReleaseBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-BIG_BROTHER_SENSE.title: Big Brother Sense
SAKURAMOD-BIG_BROTHER_SENSE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If any enemy intends to attack, gain {AttackBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
SAKURAMOD-YUKITO_LUNCH_BOX.title: Yukito Lunch Box
SAKURAMOD-MOMO_CONTRACT.title: Momo Contract
SAKURAMOD-MOMO_CONTRACT.description: Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand. [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it and it gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-YAMAZAKI_TALL_TALE.title: Yamazaki Tall Tale
SAKURAMOD-YAMAZAKI_TALL_TALE.description: Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] copy to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: The copy costs 0 this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-FUJITAKA_NOTE.title: Bing Hua Invocation
SAKURAMOD-FUJITAKA_NOTE.description: Apply {SakuraFrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to ALL enemies. Gain {WaterElements:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold]. Trigger all [gold]Water Element[/gold] talisman effects.
SAKURAMOD-NAOKO_GHOST_STORY.title: Naoko Ghost Story
SAKURAMOD-NAOKO_GHOST_STORY.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Catalog[/gold] 4: Also apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Catalog[/gold] 8: Also apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN.title: Syaoran Talisman
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each Element you play during the rest of this turn, trigger its talisman effect.
SAKURAMOD-DAOIST_SUPPORT.title: Daoist Support
SAKURAMOD-DAOIST_SUPPORT.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. It counts as all Elements this turn.{IfUpgraded:show: Draw {Cards:diff()} card.|}
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND.title: Syaoran Bond
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND.description: Put {IfUpgraded:show:an upgraded |}Syaoran Talisman into your hand. Whenever you play a Transparent Card, it gains 1 random Element it does not have this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_CAMERA.title: Tomoyo Camera
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_CAMERA.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards you used this turn. Put [red]Temporary[/red] copies of them into your hand. If they are Partner Cards, they cost 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND.title: Tomoyo Bond
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND.description: Whenever you use 2 Clear Cards, gain {TomoyoBondPower:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_GLOW.title: Dream Key Glow
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_GLOW.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. The Manifested card gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_REVELATION.title: Dream Key Revelation
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_REVELATION.descripti: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. The Manifested card gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BLANK.title: Blank
SAKURAMOD-BLANK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards from your hand, draw pile, and discard pile.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Remove your debuffs and enemy buffs. Draw 1 for each card exhausted this way.
SAKURAMOD-MIRROR.title: Mirror
SAKURAMOD-MIRROR.description:
Choose a card in hand. It gains {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It gains {ReleaseRepeat:diff()} additional [gold]Replay[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.title: Remind
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose {IfUpgraded:show:2X+1|X+1} card(s) removed by [red]Temporary[/red] this combat. Add [red]Temporary[/red] copies to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] The copies gain [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-SYNCHRONIZE.title: Synchronize
SAKURAMOD-SYNCHRONIZE.description:
Choose 2 Clear Cards in hand. This turn, when you use either one, automatically use the other.
[gold]Release:[/gold] If one is [gold]Released[/gold], both gain [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TIME.title: Time
SAKURAMOD-TIME.description:
End your turn. Take an extra turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Keep your current [gold]Block[/gold] for that extra turn.
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE.title: True or False
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE.description:
Choose one: another card in hand gains [red]Temporary[/red] and draw {Cards:diff()} cards; or [gold]Stabilize[/gold] 1 card and gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Do both.
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE_DRAW_CHOICE.desc: Another card in hand gains [red]Temporary[/red]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND.title: Star Wand
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, gain 1 Star. At 2 Star, spend 2 Star to draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK.title: Sealed Book
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK.description:
Choose one: seal 1 [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card in hand; or release 1 Sealed card. It is put into your hand, costs 0 this turn, and gains [gold]Release[/gold].
Sealed: {SealedCount}.
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK_SEAL_CHOICE.title: Seal
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK_SEAL_CHOICE.descri: Choose 1 [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card in hand. Seal it.
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK_RELEASE_CHOICE.des: Choose 1 Sealed card. Put it into your hand. It costs 0 this turn and gains [gold]Release[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE.title: Dream Key Resonance
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE.descriptio: At end of turn, choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in combat and [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it.
SAKURAMOD-CERBERUS_TRUE_FORM.title: Cerberus's True Form
SAKURAMOD-CERBERUS_TRUE_FORM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {SakuraBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold]. Deal double damage to enemies that already have [gold]Burn[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-YUE_TRUE_FORM.title: Yue's True Form
SAKURAMOD-YUE_TRUE_FORM.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. This turn, when attacked, [gold]Reflect[/gold] all damage.
SAKURAMOD-FOUR_SYMBOLS.title: Four Symbols
SAKURAMOD-FOUR_SYMBOLS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If you played all four elements this turn, deal {FullDamage:diff()} instead and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMS_END.title: Dream's End
SAKURAMOD-DREAMS_END.description: Whenever a [red]Temporary[/red] card is removed from combat this combat, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card at the start of your next turn.
SAKURAMOD-ECHO.title: Echo
SAKURAMOD-ECHO.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. This turn, the next time you use a [gold]Released[/gold] Clear Card, choose 1 Clear Card in your hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-MEMORY_FRACTURE.title: Memory Fracture
SAKURAMOD-MEMORY_FRACTURE.description: [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. At end of turn, if this is in your hand, Exhaust a random Partner Card in your hand, then Exhaust this. If there is no Partner Card, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP and keep this.
SAKURAMOD-VOID_BOND.title: Void Bond
SAKURAMOD-VOID_BOND.description: Return all Partner Cards Exhausted this combat to your hand. They cost 0 this turn. If none, draw {Cards:diff()} cards. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-TSUBASA_ANOTHER_ME.title: Another Me
SAKURAMOD-TSUBASA_ANOTHER_ME.description: Whenever you play a Tsubasa Card, play a random Transparent Card from your [gold]Catalog[/gold] for free.
SAKURAMOD-EQUIVALENT_EXCHANGE.title: Equivalent Exchange
SAKURAMOD-EQUIVALENT_EXCHANGE.selectionP: Choose any number of Partner Cards to Exhaust.
SAKURAMOD-EQUIVALENT_EXCHANGE.descriptio: Exhaust any number of Partner Cards in your hand. For each, add a random Transparent Card to your hand. They gain [gold]Release[/gold] and do not gain [red]Temporary[/red].
SAKURAMOD-COPIED_SOUL.title: Copied Soul
SAKURAMOD-COPIED_SOUL.selectionPrompt: Choose a Partner Card to copy.
SAKURAMOD-COPIED_SOUL.description: Choose a Partner Card in your hand. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] copy to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: It costs 0 this turn. This no longer Exhausts.| [gold]Exhaust[/gold].}
SAKURAMOD-SLEEPING_WINGS.title: Sleeping Wings
SAKURAMOD-SLEEPING_WINGS.description: At the start of your turn, if you have no Partner Cards in hand, draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-MEMORY_FEATHER.title: Memory Feather
SAKURAMOD-MEMORY_FEATHER.description: Choose a non-Tsubasa Card in your hand. Double its damage and Block this turn. It gains [red]Temporary[/red]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DIMENSIONAL_DRIFT.title: Dimensional Drift
SAKURAMOD-DIMENSIONAL_DRIFT.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random [red]Temporary[/red] Partner Cards to your hand. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SWORD.title: The Sword
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Damage increases as The Sword cards leave your deck.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Also deal 15 HP loss.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SWORD.title: The Sword
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SWORD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Also deal HP loss equal to {Magic:diff()}% of the enemy's current HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SHIELD.title: The Shield
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SHIELD.title: The Shield
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {Magic:diff()}% of your missing HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_JUMP.title: The Jump
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_JUMP.description:
Remove 1 random debuff from yourself. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Remove all debuffs from yourself instead.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_JUMP.title: The Jump
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_JUMP.description: At the start of your turn, remove {Magic:diff()} random debuff from yourself.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ILLUSION.title: The Illusion
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ILLUSION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain {Magic:diff()} Block for every 3 cards in your exhaust pile.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain {Magic:diff()} Block for each card in your exhaust pile instead.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_ILLUSION.title: The Illusion
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MIST.title: The Mist
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MIST.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} Poison to ALL enemies.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] First remove enemy Block and defensive buffs.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MIST.title: The Mist
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MIST.description: Remove enemy Block. Gain {NoxiousFumesPower:diff()} Noxious Fumes.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_RAIN.title: The Rain
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_RAIN.description:
All cards in your hand cost 1 less this turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] No longer [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_RAIN.title: The Rain
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_RAIN.description: Randomly choose up to {Magic:diff()} cards in your hand. They cost 0 this combat.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SWEET.title: The Sweet
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SWEET.title: The Sweet
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SWEET.description: At the start of your turn, heal {Magic:diff()}% of your missing HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_VOICE.title: The Voice
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_VOICE.description:
[gold]Invisible[/gold].
Put 1 copy of The Voice into your discard pile. Gain {Block:diff()} Block at end of turn if this card is in your hand. [gold]Echo[/gold] {Magic:diff()}.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Put 3 copies into it instead.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_VOICE.title: The Voice
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_VOICE.description: At the start of your turn, put {Magic:diff()} The Voice into your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CLOUD.title: The Cloud
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CLOUD.description:
For each [gold]Watery card[/gold] in your hand, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain 12 additional Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CLOUD.title: The Cloud
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CLOUD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block once for each 3 [gold]Watery cards[/gold] in your deck.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FLOWER.title: The Flower
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FLOWER.title: The Flower
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_EARTHY.title: The Earthy
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_EARTHY.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Lei Di into your hand. Enter [gold]Earthy state[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_EARTHY.title: The Earthy
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FIREY.title: The Firey
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FIREY.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Huo Shen into your hand. Enter [gold]Firey state[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FIREY.title: The Firey
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WATERY.title: The Watery
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WATERY.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Shui Long into your hand. Enter [gold]Watery state[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WATERY.title: The Watery
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WINDY.title: The Windy
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WINDY.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Feng Hua into your hand. Enter [gold]Windy state[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WINDY.title: The Windy
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WAVE.title: The Wave
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WAVE.description: Whenever you use an Attack, gain {Magic:diff()} Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WAVE.title: The Wave
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WAVE.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Enter all four element states.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_BIG.title: The Big
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BIG.title: The Big
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_BUBBLES.title: The Bubbles
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_BUBBLES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Remove 1 random buff from the enemy.{IfUpgraded:show: If successful, gain {Magic:diff()} Magic Charge.|}
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Remove all buffs from the enemy.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BUBBLES.title: The Bubbles
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BUBBLES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and remove their buffs.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CREATE.title: The Create
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CREATE.description:
[gold]Removable[/gold]. [gold]Cost-Decreasing[/gold]. [gold]Entity-Limited[/gold].
Add {Relics:diff()} random relic to the battle reward.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CREATE.title: The Create
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CREATE.description:
[gold]Removable[/gold].
Gain {Relics:diff()} relics as battle reward: one random relic and one character-exclusive relic.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_RETURN.title: The Return
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_RETURN.description: {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Retain[/gold]. |}Record the current state and return to this state after {Magic:diff()} rounds.{IfUpgraded:show:| Add {Voids:diff()} Void into the discard pile.}
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_RETURN.title: The Return
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_RETURN.description: [gold]Retain[/gold]. Removable. Restore all health and return 75% of the charge consumed by the last convert ({Magic:diff()}).
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_DREAM.title: The Dream
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_DREAM.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} random Clow card into your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Put {ExtraCards:diff()} additional card into it.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DREAM.title: The Dream
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DREAM.description: Convert Clow cards in your hand into Sakura cards until end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_DARK.title: The Dark
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_DARK.description: At the end of the turn, Exhaust up to {Magic:diff()} cards. If you Exhaust more than 0, gain 1 Energy next turn.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DARK.title: The Dark
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DARK.description: At the end of the turn, Exhaust your hand and add the same number of upgraded random Clow Cards to the discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MIRROR.title: The Mirror
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MIRROR.selectionPrompt: Choose a Clow or Sakura card to copy.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MIRROR.description:
Choose {Copies:diff()} Clow or Sakura card in your hand and copy it.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Put {ExtraCopies:diff()} additional copy into it.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MIRROR.title: The Mirror
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MIRROR.description: Choose 1 Clow card and put a copy of it into your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LITTLE.title: The Little
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LITTLE.title: The Little
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LOCK.title: The Lock
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LOCK.description:
Choose up to {Magic:diff()} cards in your hand and Exhaust them. For each card exhausted this way, gain 1 Magic Charge. Put a copy of this card into your discard pile.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LOCK.title: The Lock
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LOCK.description: This turn, Extra effects do not spend Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LOOP.title: The Loop
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LOOP.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card, then discard up to {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LOOP.title: The Loop
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LOOP.description: Whenever you discard a card, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_POWER.title: The Power
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_POWER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Lose 1 Strength.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Also deal 15 HP loss.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_POWER.title: The Power
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MAZE.title: The Maze
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MAZE.title: The Maze
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SAND.title: The Sand
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} Poison.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply 7 additional Poison.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SAND.title: The Sand
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SHOT.title: The Shot
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SHOT.description:
Apply 2 times. Each deals {Damage:diff()} damage and applies {PoisonPower:diff()} Poison.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply extra 3 Vulnerable.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SHOT.title: The Shot
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SHADOW.title: The Shadow
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SHADOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block and {BlurPower:diff()} Blur.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain 2 additional Blur.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SHADOW.title: The Shadow
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_DASH.title: The Dash
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DASH.title: The Dash
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DASH.description: Draw until your hand is full.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FLY.title: The Fly
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FLY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. {IfUpgraded:show:|Spend up to 3 Magic Charge.}
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Draw 2 additional cards.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FLY.title: The Fly
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FLY.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_GLOW.title: The Glow
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_GLOW.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. If you have Sealed Book, gain {Magic:diff()} Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_GLOW.title: The Glow
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_GLOW.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Magic:diff()} Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LIBRA.title: The Libra
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LIBRA.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have no Block, spend up to {Magic:diff()} Magic Charge and gain {Block:diff()} Block again.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain 12 additional Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LIBRA.title: The Libra
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LIBRA.description: Spend all Magic Charge. For each spent, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LIGHT.title: The Light
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_LIGHT.description:
Increase your maximum hand size by 2. Void no longer makes you lose Energy when drawn.{IfUpgraded:show:
Void can be used. When you use Void, Exhaust it and draw 1 card.|}
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LIGHT.title: The Light
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LIGHT.description: Exhaust all Status and Curse cards in your hand, draw pile, and discard pile. For each card exhausted this way, heal 1 HP and draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CHANGE.title: The Change
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_CHANGE.description:
Choose up to 1 card in your hand and discard it. For each card discarded this way, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Draw 2 additional cards.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CHANGE.title: The Change
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CHANGE.description: Discard all cards in your hand. Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ARROW.title: The Arrow
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ARROW.description:
Choose any number of cards in your hand and discard them, then lose all Energy. For each card discarded this way and each Energy lost, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Target a specific enemy instead.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_ARROW.title: The Arrow
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_ARROW.description: Discard your draw pile. For each unique Clow or Sakura card discarded this way, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MOVE.title: The Move
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_MOVE.description:
Put {Magic:diff()} Empty Spell into your hand.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Put 2 additional Empty Spells into it.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MOVE.title: The Move
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_MOVE.description: At the start of your turn, put {Magic:diff()} Empty Spell into your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FIGHT.title: The Fight
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain 1 Magic Charge. Gain {Magic:diff()} Strength this turn. Put a copy of this card into your hand.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain 2 additional Strength.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FIGHT.title: The Fight
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FLOAT.title: The Float
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FLOAT.description: Gain {Magic:diff()} Block for every card you draw.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FLOAT.title: The Float
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FLOAT.description: At the start of turn, gain {Magic:diff()} Dexterity.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FREEZE.title: The Freeze
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_FREEZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] If this is not an Elite or Boss combat, Stun the target.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FREEZE.title: The Freeze
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FREEZE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If this is not an Elite or Boss combat, Stun the target.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_STORM.title: The Storm
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_STORM.description:
Put 1 Void into your discard pile. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Magic:diff()} times.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Deal damage to ALL enemies instead.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_STORM.title: The Storm
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_STORM.description: Random enemies take {Magic:diff()} hits of {Damage:diff()} to {MaxDamage:diff()} damage.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_THROUGH.title: The Through
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If an enemy has Poison, {IfUpgraded:show:deepen Poison by {Magic:diff()} and |}trigger Poison damage once. Put 1 Void into your discard pile.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Also deal damage equal to {Rate:diff()}% of each enemy's max HP.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_THROUGH.title: The Through
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_THROUGH.description: Deal the higher of {Damage:diff()} and {Rate:diff()}% of each enemy's max HP to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ERASE.title: The Erase
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_ERASE.description:
Kill minions and non-Elite/Boss enemies at or below {KillPercent:diff()}% HP. Otherwise, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] The kill line becomes {ExtraKillPercent:diff()}%.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_ERASE.title: The Erase
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_ERASE.description: If the target is an Elite or Boss, gain 3 Energy. Otherwise, remove all of its powers and reduce it to 1 HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SILENT.title: The Silent
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SILENT.description:
Gain 1 Buffer. Next turn, you cannot use Attack cards.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Do not disable attacking next turn.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SILENT.title: The Silent
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SLEEP.title: The Sleep
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SLEEP.description:
Apply {Magic:diff()} [gold]Sleep[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply it to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SLEEP.title: The Sleep
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WOOD.title: The Wood
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_WOOD.description:
The target loses {Magic:diff()} Strength this turn. {IfUpgraded:show:Remove all Poison from all creatures, then apply {UpgradedPoisonPercent:diff()}% of it as Poison to the target.|Apply Poison equal to {PoisonPercent:diff()}% of the target's Poison.}
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD.title: The Wood
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SONG.title: The Song
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SONG.description:
Exhaust up to X+1 cards. For each exhausted card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply attack action extra {ExtraHits:diff()} times.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SONG.title: The Song
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SONG.description: Exhaust any number of cards. For each exhausted card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and gain {Block:diff()} Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SNOW.title: The Snow
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_SNOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies. For each Watery Clow card played this combat, this damage increases by {SnowDamage:diff()}.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Then deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SNOW.title: The Snow
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SNOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. For each [gold]Watery card[/gold] played this combat, this damage increases by {SnowDamage:diff()}.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_THUNDER.title: The Thunder
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_THUNDER.description: Requires 10 Magic Charge. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Magic:diff()} times. Put 1 Void into your discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_THUNDER.title: The Thunder
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_THUNDER.description: Spend all Energy and Magic Charge. For every {Magic:diff()} combined resource, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Energy counts double.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_TIME.title: The Time
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_TIME.description:
Apply {ClassicTimePower:diff()} Time to ALL enemies, ignoring Artifact. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Put {Voids:diff()} Void into your discard pile.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Do not put Voids into it.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TIME.title: The Time
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TIME.description: Apply {ClassicTimePower:diff()} Time to ALL enemies, ignoring Artifact. Put 1 Void into your discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_TWIN.title: The Twin
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_TWIN.description: The next Clow card you use each turn is used twice.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TWIN.title: The Twin
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TWIN.description: Clow cards cost {Amount:diff()} more this combat and are used {Amount:diff()} additional time(s).
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_NOTHING.title: The Nothing
SAKURAMOD-CLOW_NOTHING.description: Clow and Sakura cards cost 0 this combat and Exhaust. Whenever one is used, gain {Block:diff()} Block and ALL enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP. {IfUpgraded:show:|At the end of combat, randomly remove 1 other card from your deck.}
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LOVE.title: The Love
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_HOPE.title: The Hope
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_HOPE.description: All your normal damage and Block are doubled this combat.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_LEGACY.title: Legacy
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_SEAL.title: Seal
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_SEAL.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills a monster, Sealed Wand gains 2 additional charge.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_RELEASE.title: Release
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_RELEASE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card in your hand.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_RELEASE.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Choose a Clow or Sakura card in your hand. It costs 0 this turn, gains Exhaust, and its numbers increase by 50% until used. Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_TURN.title: Turn
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_TURN.selectionPrompt: Choose a Clow card to turn into Sakura.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_TURN.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold]. [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Choose an eligible Clow card in your hand. Remove its deck card and put the matching Sakura card into your deck and hand.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_EMPTY_SPELL.title: Empty Spell
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_EMPTY_SPELL.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold]. [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Choose 1 of Huo Shen, Lei Di, Feng Hua, or Shui Long and put it into your hand.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_HUO_SHEN.title: Huo Shen
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_LEI_DI.title: Lei Di
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_LEI_DI.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]. [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_FENG_HUA.title: Feng Hua
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_SHUI_LONG.title: Shui Long
